name: cli
onCreateCommand: sudo chown -R vscode:vscode ~/persistent-data && mkdir -p ~/persistent-data/mise ~/persistent-data/cache ~/persistent-data/uv ~/persistent-data/zsh && rm -rf ~/.local/share/mise ~/.cache ~/.local/share/uv && mkdir -p ~/.local/share && ln -sfn ~/persistent-data/mise ~/.local/share/mise && ln -sfn ~/persistent-data/cache ~/.cache && ln -sfn ~/persistent-data/uv ~/.local/share/uv
